title: Kimi K2.6 and Agent Swarm explained..
summary: MoonShot AI released Kimi K2.6, an improved language model particularly suited for coding tasks, long-running operations, and agent swarm coordination. The model represents capability advancement from Chinese AI labs in stable and comprehensive LLM offerings.
